description: A comprehensive machine learning framework that automates model selection and hyperparameter optimization using genetic algorithms and exhaustive search methods. Features an interactive Streamlit dashboard for visualizing model performance, comparing algorithms, and exporting results to Excel.
Ensemble machine learning framework for classifying multivariate sonar signals in marine underwater acoustics, with performance evaluation and comparative analysis of classification models.
Autonomous hybrid machine learning framework for accurate prediction of blast-induced ground vibration (PPV) in surface mining operations.

AutoInsight AI: An Explainable AutoML framework that transforms raw engineering datasets into insights through automated profiling, cleaning, feature engineering, machine learning, forecasting, and conversational analytics.
Petanque Partners develops AI-based quantitative research infrastructure, machine-learning forecasting models, and risk frameworks for liquid markets.
A modular PyTorch framework for reproducible machine learning research and scientific AI development.

Financial Risk Intelligence System (FRIS): A modular machine learning framework developed for New England College to predict student loan default risk, optimize institutional retention, and ensure federal compliance.
A Multi-Model Ensemble Framework for Flood Detection and Early Warning in Bihar using BiLSTM, SAR Imagery, Weather Data, and Machine Learning.
multiple machine learning and deep learning practice projects and framework practice repo
The R code for A scalable Bayesian double machine learning framework for high dimensional causal estimation, with application to racial disproportionality assessment

MedFusion is a healthcare diagnosis framework that makes disease prediction based on symptom and medical image analysis. It uses both machine learning and deep learning techniques (Convolutional Neural Network). This application assists in early diagnosis through an easy-to-use interface and is meant for educational purposes only.
Benchmarking framework for machine learning models

An AI framework for stress level prediction and personalized walk-time recommendation using machine learning to promote healthier lifestyle decisions.

Evaluation and benchmarking of automated machine learning (AutoML) frameworks for financial forecasting and stock market trend prediction in Python. Features data labeling, classification, and regression tasks using AutoGluon, FLAML, MLJAR, and H2O.

The project investigates GPS spoofing and jamming detection for UAV navigation using multi-modal sensor fusion. The framework combines GPS, IMU, RF, and barometric features with machine learning, deep learning, uncertainty estimation, and integrity-aware navigation control.
An open-source Python framework for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning.
ytopt: machine-learning-based autotuning and hyperparameter optimization framework using Bayesian Optimization

LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing  powered by big data and machine learning.
benchmarks machine learning models across all frameworks

Cross-platform integrative transcriptomics pipeline for the paper: "Transcriptomic Architecture of Type 2 Diabetes in Human Pancreatic Islets: An Integrative Meta-Analysis and Machine Learning Framework for Biomarker Discovery"

sm2rain_hydroai is an AI-enhanced SM2RAIN framework for estimating rainfall from satellite soil moisture. It combines physical inversion with machine learning and deep learning to improve rainfall reconstruction, extreme event monitoring, and hydrologic analysis across climates and regions.
Develop of a IA Model using classic machine learning. The goal is classify clients by it's features. Cluster K-Means algorithm used.

End-to-end Machine Learning framework for thermal prediction and condition monitoring of Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motors (PMSM). Includes data preprocessing, feature engineering, time-series forecasting, anomaly detection, model validation, afor real-time stator winding temperature prediction and predictive maintenance applications.

This project presents a machine learning framework for extracting urban infrastructure information from high-resolution satellite imagery. The objective is to automatically classify road and building pixels using feature engineering and supervised machine learning techniques.
BioMM: Biological-informed Multi-stage Machine learning framework for phenotype prediction using omics data
Open source web based machine learning framework for MCUs

A collection of internship projects focused on Artificial Intelligence, including machine learning models, deep learning architectures, natural language processing, computer vision, prompt engineering, and AI-powered application development. Built using Python and modern AI frameworks.

CleanDS is a lightweight Python framework for statistical modeling and machine learning. It supports regression, classification, clustering, shrinkage, ensembles, distributions, and dimension reduction with a unified API, formula notation, and model selection tools.
Discover key research papers on Quantum Machine Learning (QML) and explore transfer learning frameworks, applications, and optimization strategies.
An educational machine learning framework built from first principles using NumPy, exploring tensors, automatic differentiation, optimization, neural networks, and deep learning systems.
A comprehensive framework for modeling complex systems, executing sandboxed operations, machine learning predictions, and optimizing multi-agent objectives.
Adversarial Machine Learning Attack and Defense Framework

A hybrid HMM-LSTM framework that predicts market regimes and forecasts volatility. It pairs a Gaussian HMM for latent state detection with a 2-layer LSTM to eliminate state blindness. Tested on 20002026 data, it achieves 84% regime accuracy and a 53% reduction in RMSE over standard baselines
Machine learning framework for mutation pathogenicity prediction using sequence-derived and structural descriptors.
Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework
A dependently-typed machine learning framework for Lean 4, providing compile-time tensor shape verification.

This dataset presents transactions that occurred in two days, where we have 492 frauds out of 284,807 transactions. The dataset is highly unbalanced, the positive class (frauds) account for 0.172% of all transact
Threat detection using machine learning techniques built using python django framework as backend and mysqlite3 for database.

A hybrid machine learning and classical numerical framework for solving Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) , featuring real-time failure detection , robustness evaluation , and adaptive resource orchestration (deployment and computational cost)
Statistical audit and Machine Learning analysis of workplace pay equity. Investigating gender bias in salary structures and implementing ethical AI frameworks for HR decision-making.

Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.

A comparative machine learning and deep learning framework for high-risk lung cancer patient classification, including data preprocessing, SMOTE balancing, feature selection, model evaluation, ROC-AUC analysis, and Streamlit GUI deployment.

An enterprise-ready predictive analytics framework and machine learning engine optimized for subscription-based business models. This system forecasts customer lifecycle values, pre-emptively flags cancellation risks, and uncovers empirical retention drivers to protect recurring revenue margins.
Fake News Detection using Machine Learning (NLP)  built with TF-IDF and Multinomial Naive Bayes, deployed using Flask web framework for real-time news classification.
A GeoAI framework for Land Use Land Cover classification using Sentinel-2 data, feature engineering, and machine learning models including Random Forest, XGBoost, CART, and KNN.

Simulation-based climate risk prediction framework using hybrid machine learning models (RF, XGB, GAM, Stack). Includes synthetic data generation, model training, calibration analysis, spatial validation, and sensitivity testing. Fully reproducible with fixed seeds for transparent and scalable benchmarking.

End-to-end Credit Risk Analytics pipeline and Loss Given Default (LGD) prediction model built on 2,000,000 retail loan records. Features data cleaning, winsorization, feature engineering, OLS diagnostics, and regularized machine learning frameworks.

A data-driven ML framework analyzing food affordability across ~3,100 U.S. counties to predict obesity, diabetes, and Medicare costs. Combines autoencoders, PCA, XGBoost, and Double Machine Learning (DML) causal inference via EconML. Identifies a $3.50/meal policy tipping point with simulated savings in billions across 65M Medicare beneficiaries.

This repository contains an end-to-end Machine Learning classification framework designed to analyze whether an individual has developed an Imaginary Companion (IC) based on their self-reported psychometric and psychological health scores.

drift-demo is a fully self-contained Python framework that simulates, detects, and responds to machine-learning data drift in a streaming environment. In real-world deployments, models trained on historical data gradually degrade in performance as the real-world distribution of inputs and labels shifts over time - a phenomenon called drift

Open-source Python implementation of a multi-center computational framework for fibromyalgia: combines unsupervised machine learning for phenotypic clustering, multi-state Markov chains for stochastic trajectory modeling, and Andersen-Gill recurrent-event survival analysis
A probabilistic machine-learning framework for quasar classification and photometric redshift estimation using DECaLS and WISE survey photometry.
vnpy-Machine-Learning: integrates machine-learning models with the vn.py quantitative-trading framework for AI-driven, data-driven algorithmic trading and backtesting in Python.

A research-oriented machine learning framework for customer satisfaction prediction using XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, Random Forest, SHAP explainability, hyperparameter optimization, and statistical validation.

Developed a machine-learning-driven framework for rapid prediction of rarefied hypersonic flow fields and efficient DSMC domain decomposition, reducing computational cost while preserving solution accuracy.
Project website for CREST, a hardware-in-the-loop neural architecture search framework for deployment-realistic embedded machine learning on resource-constrained microcontrollers.
Framework code to discuss, design and implement in Bristol Machine Learning and Data Science meetups
A machine learning and deep learning framework for early detection of abnormal physiological patterns in psychiatric patients using wearable devices.

SepsisSentinel: An advanced clinical data science and machine learning framework for the early detection and forecasting of sepsis utilizing clinical datasets. Built with scalable data pipelines and predictive modeling.
Polygenic risk score (PGS) and machine learning framework for primary open-angle glaucoma prediction in African ancestry cohorts.

The "universal" system is built to be industry-agnostic, capable of processing diverse data streamsfrom banking transactions to telecom usageusing a unified machine learning pipeline.
A central hub for my Machine Learning journey. Features core concepts, algorithms from scratch, framework implementations, and practical hands-on projects.

An explainable machine learning framework for breast cancer diagnosis using Genetic Algorithm (GA)-based feature selection, Support Vector Machine (SVM) classification, and SHAP explainability.
An AI-ready geospatial framework integrating global soil microbiomes, environmental covariates, and spatial machine learning for ecological analysis and prediction.

Comprehensive developer knowledge base and RAG-ready dataset covering programming languages, frameworks, AI, machine learning, cloud, DevOps, system design, interview preparation, and real-world projects from beginner to advanced levels.

A two-phase machine learning framework featuring an adversarial attack fuzzer and defensive hardening loop evaluated against the CICIDS2017 dataset.

Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.
AI-enhanced IEC 62443 risk assessment framework for oil and gas ICS security using Python, Flask, threat intelligence, and machine learning.

It combines VTMI-based feature selection, ensemble classifiers, and SHAP/LIME interpretability to support transparent, reliable, and clinically meaningful decision-making.

Comprehensive framework for extracting interpretable decision trees from black-box machine learning models. This project focuses on **post-hoc local/global interpretability** through **rule/tree extraction** methods.

An agent-based restaurant simulator combined with a machine learning pipeline that finds optimal table layouts by minimizing waiter travel distance.  Built entirely from scratch  no frameworks, no library dependencies for the core simulation.

BioGraphX is a comprehensive framework for extracting biophysical features from protein sequences using graph-theoretical approaches. The system models proteins as interaction networks where residues form nodes and biochemical interactions form edges, enabling sophisticated feature extraction for downstream machine learning applications

flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks
